I now stand the idolatries of the generation. I sever the connecting links that bind me into the patterns of idolatry from blood relatives in ages past. I come against the idols of home, jewels, modes of transportation, food, drink, titles, appearance, power, people, money, land, animals, and possession of every kind.

Father, forgive. I make Holy choice for my family tree that we shall serve only our God - the living God.
